name: BlockUI
description: BlockUI represents people using icons, labels and images.

props.name: fullScreen
props.description: When enabled, the whole document gets blocked.

props.name: baseZIndex
props.description: Base zIndex value to use in layering.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: block
events.description: Fired when the element gets blocked.

events.name: unblock
events.description: Fired when the element gets unblocked.
